title: 1級 模擬テスト10 リスニング第1部 (Kyoto) 1
prompt: 対話を聞いて、最後の発言に最も合う応答を一つ選んでください。
audioText:
A: Have you had the chance to visit the space exploration in Kyoto, Grace?
B: Yes, although there were many people there.
A: I see. Would you recommend it to others?
explanation: grade1-10-listening1-01: リスニング第1部の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 1級 模擬テスト10 読解 1
prompt: 対話を聞いて、最後の発言に最も合う応答を一つ選んでください。
passage: Recently, space exploration has become very popular in London. Since 2021, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 17 more events related to space exploration.
explanation: grade1-10-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 1級 模擬テスト10 英文要約 1
prompt:
次の条件に従って、解答しなさい。（※模擬テストシステム上、最も適切な選択肢を選んでください）

[Mock 10-1]
passage: Some people in London believe that space exploration should be a priority. They argue that it provides long-term benefits for 17 residents. On the other hand, Rachel thinks that it costs too much money. Ultimately, finding a balance is crucial.
